items.title: How Many Markets Does Apple Dominate? The Answer Might Shock You
items.description: The iPhone recently took the crown to become the world's top-selling smartphone. That's just the tip of the iceberg.

items.title: Michael Burry Says He 'Slept' on Bitcoin After Early 2013 Buying Opportunity
items.description: On Sunday, Michael Burry used an X post to lay out what he described as 26 years of major market calls. That self-audit arrives as Bitcoin lacks utility remains central to his current framework, with Burry arguing the token has not proven durable as a hedge against currency debasement. In the post, Burry shared about his missed opportunity with crypto, writing that he considered buying Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) in 2013 after meeting a friend at Lightspeed but did not follow through. items.title: Dow slides 800 points as sell-off ramps up following Trump's global tariff hike: Live updates
items.description: Wall Street is coming off a volatile session on Friday after the Supreme Court struck down President Donald Trump’s tariffs.

items.title: How Apple’s Lazy AI Strategy Could Crush the Competition
items.description: Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL) has trailed in the artificial intelligence (AI) race since its early stages. From the start, the company lagged behind rivals in developing large language models and AI infrastructure. Its current initiatives, such as Apple Intelligence and updates to Siri, have progressed slowly, with key features delayed until 2026. This pace raises concerns that ... How Apple’s Lazy AI Strategy Could Crush the Competition

items.title: Cloud Storage Always Full? Follow These Three Steps to Clean It Up.
items.description: As soon as my son was born, my cloud storage started filling up—fast.  Google calculates that I will max that out within four years.  Are we forever destined to pay more cloud rent to Google,  Apple  or other providers?
